title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.120 - No presumptions
text:
630.120.  No presumptions. — No patient or resident, either voluntary or involuntary, shall be presumed to be incompetent, to forfeit any legal right, responsibility or obligation or to suffer any legal disability as a citizen, unless otherwise prescribed by law, as a consequence of receiving evaluation, care, treatment, habilitation or rehabilitation for a mental disorder, mental illness, intellectual disability, developmental disability, alcohol problem or drug problem.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724, A.L. 2011 H.B. 555 merged with H.B. 648)
